parameters.query:
SELECT
  mg.id, mg.raw_id, mg.slug, mg.name, mg.manufacturer, mg.category, mg.size,
  mg.filter_modifier, mg.shatter_modifier, mg.charge_rate_modifier,
  mg.instability_modifier, mg.window_size_modifier, mg.catastrophic_rate_modifier,
  mg.stats, mg.uex_id,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'terminal', t.name,
      'buy', p.buy_price,
      'sell', p.sell_price
    ) ORDER BY t.name)
    FROM prices p
    JOIN trade_terminals t ON t.id = p.terminal_id
    WHERE p.item_external_id = mg.uex_id
      AND mg.uex_id IS NOT NULL
      AND GREATEST(COALESCE(p.buy_price, 0), COALESCE(p.sell_price, 0)) > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS uex_prices,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'shop', si.shop,
      'location', si.location,
      'buy', si.buy_auec,
      'sell', si.sell_auec
    ) ORDER BY si.shop)
    FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si
    WHERE si.item_raw_id = mg.raw_id
      AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_mining_gear_raw'
      AND GREATEST(COALESCE(si.buy_auec, 0), COALESCE(si.sell_auec, 0)) > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS datap4k_prices

FROM datap4k_mining_gear_norm mg
WHERE mg.id = {{$json["id"]}};
